dct_title_s: Fezzae et Marocchi regna Africae celeberrima
dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian.
Oriented with north to the right.
Bar scale in lower left: "Milliaria Germanica communia".
Includes decorative cartouche in lower left framed by 2 flag-bearing satyrs and 2 crowns.
Includes ill. of ships in the "Golfo de las yeguaz."
Text on verso: "Die Königreichen Fessanum und Maurocanum".
From Willem Blaeu's Toonneel des aerdrycx ... Amsterdam, 1642, no. 3, Africa C.
